Author: Ninethirty77
Name: The Studium
Description: Records observed Company Credits totals, shows weekly GC Seals tier progression, FC progress rings, an optional overlay, and a preview Studium Crafters workflow. Use /thestudium to open the window.
Changelog:
Studium Crafters selection polish:
- Makes the craft-set dropdown fill the queue panel width.
- Gives the craft-set dropdown a taller click target for easier selection.
- Tightens the selected-item status message in the Crafters workflow strip.
